commit.message:
Add error detection & alerting system

Three-tier error handling:
- Student-facing: toast notifications with plain-language messages,
  hints, and "admin has been notified" disclaimers
- Admin: /admin/health dashboard with error stats, API uptime,
  severity breakdown, recent error log, auto-refresh
- Claude: /api/admin/health?format=claude returns markdown report
  for AI debugging sessions

Components:
- error-logger.js: severity levels, student message mapping, error
  stats aggregation, health checks, spike detection, Claude formatter
- ErrorBoundary.js: React crash recovery with friendly fallback UI
- ToastNotifications.js: stackable toast system with auto-dismiss
- /api/errors/report: client error reporting endpoint
- /api/admin/health: admin health data API (JSON + Claude markdown)
- /admin/health: dark-themed admin dashboard page

Also wired retry logic (exponential backoff, 2 retries) into
dashboard email scan and accept handlers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add MIT service with suggest, set, and get functions (#93)

Pure scoring function ranks tasks by reschedule count and age to suggest
the Most Important Task. Persistence uses the same upsert pattern as
stats_service. 9 tests covering all paths.

Returns an MIT suggestion based on today's pending top-level tasks,
or 204 No Content if fewer than 3 tasks. Adds schema, frontend API
function, and 2 endpoint tests.

commit.message:
Fix activate/deactivate staff buttons not working on mobile

**Problem:**
- Activate/Deactivate buttons work on desktop but not on mobile devices
- Mobile browsers have 300ms tap delay and touch event handling issues
- Buttons were unresponsive to taps on mobile

**Solution:**
Added mobile-optimized CSS properties to button:
- `touchAction: 'manipulation'` - Removes 300ms tap delay on mobile
- `WebkitTapHighlightColor: 'transparent'` - Removes default tap highlight

**How it works:**
- `touch-action: manipulation` tells mobile browsers to immediately fire
  click events without waiting to detect double-tap gestures
- This eliminates the frustrating delay users experience on mobile

**Impact:**
✅ Buttons now respond instantly to taps on mobile
✅ Desktop functionality unchanged
✅ Better mobile UX for staff management

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Week 7: fix K-Fold overflow, restructure Stratified K-Fold flow

- K-Fold CV: reduce image to w:600, move bullets to separate "How It Works" slide

- Add "The Punchline" slide: from-scratch → sklearn does it in one argument

fix: chart not rendering — GT OHLCV timestamps are seconds, not milliseconds

The /1000 division collapsed 216 candles into 948s range with 36 duplicate
timestamps. lightweight-charts requires strictly increasing timestamps,
so it threw an error and rendered nothing.

- Add useRef guard in onSubmit to block double-submission synchronously,
  before React re-renders with isSubmitting=true

1. Send test notification + guide to enable permissions if blocked

works without arguments after initial setup.

commit.message:
fix: three-tier cache — stable, season-scoped, weekly

cachedQuery now supports a seasonID option. When provided, the
published-week tag only applies if the seasonID matches the current
published season. Past seasons (1-34) keep their cached data
permanently — no more re-querying frozen historical data on every
week publish.

Three tiers:
- stable: true — never invalidates (slugs, schedules, metadata)
- seasonID provided — only invalidates for the current season
- neither — invalidates every publish (bowler stats, H2H, all-time)

Also marks getCurrentSeasonID and getAllBowlersDirectory as stable.

- Blog: primer post real del usuario (título + foto) en lugar de AI-generado

- QR estampilla: genera PNG con borde de puntos y nombre del usuario
- Dashboard interno: panel HTML con usuarios, eventos y log de cambios
- dashboard_server.py: servidor Flask local en puerto 7788
- Pipeline: semáforo asyncio (un pipeline a la vez), cooldown 2 min
- Email: delay de 10 min para dar tiempo a GitHub Pages
- Mensaje final: incluye lista de comandos /post /nuevo /cancelar
- Logging en tiempo real de inputs/outputs de cada agente
- Cloud Run: Dockerfile, requirements.txt, .dockerignore, deploy-cloudrun.sh
- cloud_storage.py: abstracción GCS/local detectada por GCS_BUCKET env var
- Webhook mode: WEBHOOK_URL env var activa modo webhook para Cloud Run
- Todos los datos persistidos via cloud_storage (usuarios, eventos, pendientes)

commit.message:
Initial release: bridge Linux desktop notifications to macOS via WebSocket

- Server monitors D-Bus notifications (BecomeMonitor/eavesdrop) and broadcasts via WebSocket
- macOS client connects, receives, and displays native notifications via terminal-notifier
- CLI `send` subcommand for shell scripts and coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, etc.)
- Multi-client support, auto-reconnect, keepalive
- systemd service for Linux, venv-based install for macOS

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
